top_signals.title: Phillippine Peso Approaches Record Low as Oil Prices Advance
top_signals.summary: The Philippine peso falls toward a record low as escalating tensions in the Middle East drove oil prices higher, putting renewed pressure on the currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: What to Know About Shein's Plans for Mega HK IPO
top_signals.summary: Fast-fashion giant Shein is seeking to list in Hong Kong as soon as August, targeting to raise about $2 billion to $3 billion, sources say. Minmin Low reports on the company's fundamentals. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Hormuz toll threats, Mideast tensions keep investors on edge
top_signals.summary: Dwindling hopes of a Mideast peace deal and a tech sell-off sent U.S. benchmark indexes lower overnight, while Asia markets traded lower Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
